summary: P0 bug fix verified END-TO-END: historical matches now load the Live experience via ?match_id=<id>. Tested 3 different historical match_ids (1535465 GT/RCB, 1535464 RR/GT, 1529312 RR/MI) + featured root + invalid id + full Time Machine -> Live navigation flow (2 different cards). All target scenarios pass. Skip-to-death now dynamic per match. WhySheet slide-in still opens but data fetch fails due to a pre-existing (NOT introduced by this fix) at_ball_id format bug that also affects the featured match.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when at_ball_id uses the format the frontend sends ('<match>-i1-003'). Only well-formed ids like '<match>-i1-o1.6' or omitting the param return 200. Reproducible on ALL matches including featured — pre-existing bug, not a regression from the P0 fix.

integration_issues.issue: Panel slides in with correct player_name/team/role header, but body shows 'Request failed with status code 404'. Root cause: frontend constructs at_ball_id like '1535465-i1-003' (missing 'o' prefix and using integer ball index) whereas backend stores ball_ids like '1535465-i1-o1.6'. Pre-existing bug — not caused by the Live/?match_id= fix — but user-visible regression on ALL rating-cell clicks.

action_items: Fix at_ball_id construction in the ImpactBoard/WhySheet callsite so the id it passes matches the backend's ball_id format (e.g. use ball.ball_id from state directly instead of building a synthetic '<match>-i<inn>-<index>' string).
Optional: On the backend, make /api/ratings/{match_id}/{player_id} tolerant to a missing/unknown at_ball_id (fall back to latest snapshot instead of 404) to be resilient to client id mistakes.
critical_code_review_comments: Live.jsx correctly reads useSearchParams and re-fetches on requestedMatchId change — verified by 4 unique matches rendering distinct headers.
ReplayControls only shows Skip-to-finish when onSkipToDeath is provided — verified visible on all 4 loaded matches and click moved ball counter from 6 -> 202/233 for match 1535465.
Momentum chart renders progressively via SSE on historical matches (SVG paths present, curve visible).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on P0 scope; WhySheet body fetch fails (pre-existing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 (historical match Live loading) is fully fixed. If retesting, use match_ids 1535465, 1535464, 1529312 (all non-featured) and 1359487 (featured). WhySheet 404 is a separate, older bug — verify by hitting /api/ratings/1359487/0a509d6b?at_ball_id=1359487-i1-003 which returns 404 too.
rca of the issue: Original P0 bug — three defects fixed together: (1) Live.jsx didn't read the match_id query param, always fetched featured; (2) fallback check `if (!featured.length)` was against an object {matches,total} so it was always truthy-broken; (3) skipTarget was undefined. All three are resolved in the current build. Verified by navigating /?match_id=<id> for three distinct non-featured matches and confirming match-header teams match card data, plus by clicking two different Time Machine cards and confirming distinct matches load (no cache bleed).
